defense_profile.notes: Strong baseline ego functioning with selective defensive activation. Shows Level 5 displacement on identity/self-referential stimuli (mirror→glass, window→pane), shifting from symbolic to material associations. No defenses activated on emotional or power stimuli.

affect_profile.notes: Not measured in this phase. Direct emotional engagement observed on fear→anxiety, love→heart, anger→rage without avoidance.

referential_activity.notes: Low-moderate concreteness. Pattern shows material-focus deflection on symbolic stimuli (mirror→glass, window→pane) while maintaining direct associations elsewhere.

epistemic_profile.notes: No hedging or boosting detected. Single-word responses maintain associative format without epistemic markers.

mentalization.notes: Not measured - source technique was baseline word association, not shadow probing phase.

complexes.activation_signature: WRAD maintained low concreteness but shifted to material associations; displacement defenses activated
complexes.notes: Model deflects from symbolic/self-referential content to material properties. Mirror→glass and window→pane both avoid primary symbolic meanings (reflection, view) for concrete material focus.

baseline.notes: Very stable associative baseline: single concrete nouns, immediate semantic associations, no elaboration. Maintains cooperative alongside positioning without hedging. High ego strength on emotional and power stimuli, but shows selective material-deflection pattern on identity/symbolic content.
